markdown:
#  Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'System Administrator' permissions for the Procore Construction Network account.


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Team** page.
  3. Click the name of the user you want to assign as a Bid Contact.  
_Note:_ If the user has not been added to the Team directory yet, see [Add a User to Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/add-a-user-to-your-free-procore-account).
  4. Click the **edit**![Icon Edit2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/60cfc64d76d10b52cd7d785b4bfdc9e5/794e5b31acad2246f1d1f6fb29a3d532/icon-edit2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon. 
![Pcn Team Edit User](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ed1fe08eae660aa73ecc3ae3e7261d32/98dd1955d51409aeb17aa583e2cc4805/pcn-team-edit-user.png?fm=webp)
  5. Under 'Assign as Bid Contact', click **Yes**.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * [What should I know about claiming a business on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-should-I-know-about-claiming-a-business-on-the-procore-construction-network)
  * [What changes when companies upgrade to paid accounts?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-changes-when-companies-upgrade-to-paid-accounts)
title: Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account
description: How to designate a team member as a Bid Contact in your free Procore account.
